title: Advanced List Techniques
description: Implement pull‑to‑refresh, infinite scrolling, and handle empty states.

slides.title: Pull to Refresh 🔄
Infinite Scrolling (End reached)

quizData.question: Which prop would you use to detect when the user scrolls near the end of a FlatList?
quizData.explanation: `onEndReached` is called when the scroll position is within `onEndReachedThreshold` of the end.

slides.title: Empty States 📭
slides.content:
## Showing a Message When Data is Empty

Use `ListEmptyComponent` to render a component when the data array is empty.

```jsx
<FlatList
  data={[]}
  renderItem={...}
  ListEmptyComponent={
    <View style={{ alignItems: 'center', padding: 20 }}>
      <Text>No items found.</Text>
    </View>
  }
/>
```

This is a great place to show an illustration or a friendly message.

slides.title: Common Pitfall ⚠️
slides.content: When using `onEndReached` for pagination, make sure you don't call it repeatedly. Use a `loading` flag to prevent multiple requests. Also, reset the page number when refreshing.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content: For a truly smooth infinite scroll, consider using `getItemLayout` if your items have fixed heights. This allows the list to jump to the right offset when new items are added without flickering.
